text: - g. (Division 23) Mechanical Piping -All mechanical piping systems with a diameter 3/4' and larger, inclusive of fittings, valves, insulation, equipment and clearances as required by equipment and code, modeled at the correct orientation, location and size.  Hangers and supports, accessories, in-wall piping (LOD 350).  Modeled equipment to include boilers, heat exchangers and associated clearances. Required access panels shall also be modeled.
